subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! Sing thou praise of My chosen Name, for verily whosoever in this Day becometh assured of this oft-mentioned Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر نار باسم مختارم تغنی نما چه که هر نفسی الیوم باین اسم مذکور موقن شود
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
